label: 05 Flex-Getter
info:
NODE: Modbus-Flex-Getter (dynamic read)

FEATURES IN THIS FLOW
- FC / address / quantity / unit id come from msg.payload each time
- Same node can issue FC3 Holding and FC1 Coils in one flow
- Both unitId and unitid accepted (v5.46+)

WHAT THE CONFIG DOES
- Node editor mainly selects the Modbus-Client
- msg.payload shape: { fc, unitid|unitId, address, quantity }
- useIOFile / useIOForPayload → optional named IO mapping (see example 11)
- keepMsgProperties → correlation fields survive the round-trip

HOW TO RUN
1) Deploy
2) Click FC3 qty 4 → read Holding Registers
3) Click FC1 coils → read coils with a different payload
4) Edit the Function nodes to change address/quantity at runtime

Demo TCP port: 10506

Config nodes are flow-scoped: delete this tab to remove client/IO config.

name: Build FC3
func:
msg.payload = { fc: 3, unitid: 1, address: 0, quantity: 4 };
return msg;

name: Build FC1
func:
msg.payload = { fc: 1, unitid: 1, address: 0, quantity: 8 };
return msg;
